explicit_non_goal: Do not implement full topology flow in Q2.
problem: Flow matching currently produces geometry-first raw_flow/constrained_flow coordinates. Atom type and bond structure quality can be affected by downstream inference or repair, but Q2 should not claim joint topology diffusion or full molecular flow.

layer_semantics.description: Generated coordinates and atom types before bond refinement or geometry repair.
Optional topology head predicts pairwise bond logits from fixed raw geometry, atom types, topology context, and gated pocket summaries.
layer_semantics.claim_boundary: Topology refinement evidence, not full topology flow.

layer_semantics.description: Deterministic valence-constrained decoding over bond logits with atom-type-specific max-valence limits.
Any coordinate movement, centroid correction, clash handling, or postprocessing repair.

proposed_components.name: BondLogitRefinementHead
constraints: bounded top-k candidate edges per atom

ablation_matrix.description: Emit bond_logits_refined without valence decoding; evaluate logits only where labels exist.
Decode valence-constrained bonds while preserving raw coordinates.
Apply existing repaired layer after bond refinement; must remain postprocessing.

claim_guardrails: Exclude full topology flow and joint molecular diffusion claims.
Report raw geometry, bond_logits_refined, valence_refined, and repaired as separate layers.
Do not promote repaired docking scores as native model capability.
Require RDKit and score_only backend coverage before using refined layers for preference construction.
